meaning: vt.(尤指动物)吞吃,狼吞虎咽,挥霍,(火灾等)毁灭,破坏,吞没,贪看,贪听
examples: The dogs come and devour the bacon.
Passing the pangolin around like a football, inquisitive lions spent hours trying to devour the armor-plated creature.
A medium-sized dog will devour at least one can of food plus biscuits per day.
Office workers and leisure lunchers devour Vietnamese roast pork banh mi sandwiches from Nomnom ( www.nomnomtruck.com).
When the wasp larvae hatch, they devour the stink bug eggs and kill them.
